sn2.20:1.0.1: Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho anāthapiṇḍiko devaputto bhagavato santike imā gāthāyo abhāsi:
sn2.20:1.0.3: Kammaṁ vijjā ca dhammo ca,sīlaṁ jīvitamuttamaṁ;Etena maccā sujjhanti,na gottena dhanena vā.
sn2.20:1.0.4: Tasmā hi paṇḍito poso,sampassaṁ atthamattano;Yoniso vicine dhammaṁ,evaṁ tattha visujjhati.
sn2.20:1.0.5: Sāriputtova paññāya,sīlena upasamena ca;Yopi pāraṅgato bhikkhu,etāvaparamo siyā"ti.
sn2.20:1.0.6: Idamavoca anāthapiṇḍiko devaputto. Idaṁ vatvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā tatthevantaradhāyi.
sn2.20:1.0.7: Atha kho bhagavā tassā rattiyā accayena bhikkhū āmantesi: "imaṁ, bhikkhave, rattiṁ aññataro devaputto abhikkantāya rattiyā abhikkantavaṇṇo kevalakappaṁ jetavanaṁ obhāsetvā yenāhaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā maṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho, bhikkhave, so devaputto mama santike imā gāthāyo abhāsi:
sn2.20:1.0.9: Kammaṁ vijjā ca dhammo ca,sīlaṁ jīvitamuttamaṁ;Etena maccā sujjhanti,na gottena dhanena vā.
sn2.20:1.0.10: Tasmā hi paṇḍito poso,sampassaṁ atthamattano;Yoniso vicine dhammaṁ,evaṁ tattha visujjhati.
sn2.20:1.0.11: Sāriputtova paññāya,sīlena upasamena ca;Yopi pāraṅgato bhikkhu,etāvaparamo siyā’ti.
sn2.20:1.0.12: Idamavoca, bhikkhave, so devaputto. Idaṁ vatvā maṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā tatthevantaradhāyī"ti.
sn2.20:1.0.13: Evaṁ vutte, āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "so hi nūna, bhante, anāthapiṇḍiko devaputto bhavissati. Anāthapiṇḍiko gahapati āyasmante sāriputte abhippasanno ahosī"ti.
